pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script downloads and explicitly names the input file.
Task description directly specifies this path for the DIMAP format output.
Task description directly specifies this path for the GeoTIFF format output.
Task description explicitly requires reprojection to WGS 84 (EPSG:4326).
Task description subsets X: 0 to 200 and Y: 0 to 200, generating a 201x201 raster. Reprojection to EPSG:4326 preserves similar dimensions, making 400 a safe upper bound validation value.

Python rasterio analysis of the downloaded https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif confirms the presence of 4 bands, which will be preserved through subsetting and reprojection.

privileged_info_summary: The input data is a real Landsat multispectral GeoTIFF sourced from opengeos GitHub repo. Analysis confirms it possesses 4 spectral bands. The task expects the agent to subset the region to 200x200 and perform a reprojection to EPSG:4326. The expected outputs are /home/ga/snap_projects/landsat_subset_wgs84.dim (DIMAP format) and /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_subset_wgs84.tif (GeoTIFF format). The resulting raster dimension will remain below a 400px threshold.
